title: nemuaron vieillardii
side_effects: Nemuaron vieillardii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, as well as headaches and dizziness due to its potent neurostimulating properties. In rare cases, excessive consumption can lead to more severe side effects like rapid heartbeat, palpitations, and even respiratory problems. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing conditions, such as high blood pressure, may experience exacerbated symptoms when using the plant without proper guidance. It is crucial to consult a medical professional before using nemuaron vieillardii or any other herbal remedy to minimize potential health risks.
